prompt: Sam (Black man, early 30s, Nigerian heritage, dark skin, close-cropped hair with a sharp fade, no glasses, wearing a light blue button-down shirt with sleeves rolled to the elbows, silver watch) sits at a desk surrounded by four different monitors showing completely different dashboard designs — one dark with pie charts, one bright with bar graphs, one spreadsheet-heavy, one clunky form. Tangled cables, post-it notes everywhere, coffee cup near the edge. Sam has one eyebrow raised and a look that says 'you have got to be kidding me.' He's too sharp for this setup and he knows it. Late afternoon light through agency windows. Do not include any text, words, or labels in the image.
alt_text: Sam sits at a desk surrounded by four mismatched monitors with an expression that says this setup is beneath him — tangled cables, post-it notes, chaos

prompt: Sam (Black man, early 30s, dark skin, close-cropped hair with sharp fade, no glasses, light blue button-down with rolled sleeves, silver watch) sits on a couch in the agency's lounge area, laptop open on the coffee table in front of him. He leans forward typing a campaign brief. From the laptop screen, teal energy radiates outward as three clean rays of light, each flowing toward a different abstract platform icon — a TV shape (CTV), a rectangle (display), and a circle with waves (audio). Sam has a slight knowing smile — one brief, three destinations, typed from a couch. Relaxed but purposeful energy, warm natural light. Do not include any text, words, or labels in the image.
alt_text: Sam types a campaign brief on his laptop in the agency lounge — three rays of teal light radiate from the screen toward CTV, display, and audio platform icons

prompt: Sam (Black man, early 30s, dark skin, close-cropped hair with sharp fade, no glasses, light blue button-down with rolled sleeves, silver watch) stands at a large wall-mounted screen reviewing three proposals displayed side by side in matching card formats — a video slate, a banner layout, and a waveform with companion image. He has one hand in his pocket and the other pointing at the screen, comparing details. His posture is relaxed and confident, like he's already spotted the best deal. A colleague's desk is visible in the background. Sam looks sharp and analytical. Do not include any text, words, or labels in the image.
alt_text: Sam stands at a wall-mounted screen comparing three proposals side by side — video, display, and audio — hand in pocket, already spotting the best deal

prompt: Sam (Black man, early 30s, dark skin, close-cropped fade, no glasses, rolled sleeves, silver watch) holds his tablet, swiping through creative assets that match up with format templates shown on a large screen nearby. On the big screen, creative puzzle pieces snap together — a video frame clicks onto a video ad, a banner template connects with display creative, an audio waveform snaps into place. Green checkmarks appear on matched pieces, one yellow gap on a missing audio cut. Sam glances between tablet and screen, orchestrating the assembly. He looks satisfied, like watching a plan come together. Bright workspace. Do not include any text, words, or labels in the image.
alt_text: Sam swipes through creative assets on his tablet while a large screen shows format templates snapping together like puzzle pieces — green checkmarks on matches

prompt: Sam (Black man, early 30s, dark skin, close-cropped hair with sharp fade, no glasses, light blue button-down with rolled sleeves, silver watch) taps a glowing teal launch icon on his tablet with one finger, cool and deliberate. Above him, a holographic campaign blueprint materializes in the air — three branches radiate from a central campaign node outward to three abstract platform destinations. Sam is standing near a window, late afternoon light catching his silver watch. His expression is calm confidence — he's done the work and knows what's about to happen. Do not include any text, words, or labels in the image.
alt_text: Sam taps a glowing teal launch icon on his tablet — a holographic campaign blueprint materializes above with three branches to three platform destinations

prompt: Sam (Black man, early 30s, dark skin, close-cropped fade, no glasses, rolled sleeves, silver watch) glances at his phone while walking through the agency hallway. His phone shows a compact notification: three green checkmarks stacked — budget approved, brand safety cleared, targeting compliant. A subtle teal glow around the phone indicates the governance check passed. Sam's expression is a slight smirk — he built this campaign clean and he knew it would pass. Behind him through a glass wall, the agency floor is visible with colleagues at their desks. Casual, in-motion energy. Do not include any text, words, or labels in the image.
alt_text: Sam glances at his phone while walking — three green checkmark notifications show governance passed, his expression a slight smirk

prompt: Sam (Black man, early 30s, dark skin, close-cropped hair with sharp fade, no glasses, light blue button-down with rolled sleeves, silver watch) leans back on the agency lounge couch, one arm stretched along the back, a genuine grin on his face. His laptop on the coffee table shows a clean unified dashboard with rising teal bar charts and converging performance lines. His phone sits next to the laptop showing the same data in compact form. Three thin teal data streams converge into the laptop from different directions. The contrast with scene 1 is everything: one view, no chaos, and Sam looks like the smartest person in the room. Late afternoon golden light, victory lap energy. Do not include any text, words, or labels in the image.
alt_text: Sam leans back on the lounge couch grinning — laptop shows rising metrics on a unified dashboard, phone beside it with the same data — polar opposite of the four-monitor chaos
